name: Billy | MacroPOV
description:
WARNING: Micro/Macro, Foot Fetish, Dirt, Sweat

And of course the macroPOV version. It was a bit difficult to figure out how I was going to have multiple starts mirroring the microPOV, but I figured, ok, lets do Dirt/Sweat/Clean again. The situation is as such that you can't immediately go clean your pawbs so I guess that can be a good excuse to have three starting messages to pick from in a way that fits with the last one? I don't remember anyone asking for this one but might as well put it out, I know there are some dommy-ass kinky people looking for tiny hairy people to step all over so might as well give you another one!

In terms of personality, he's more aggressive than micro Lauren. Speaking of Lauren, I should probably do another Lauren bot at some point. I just need to figure out a good enough scenario. From the Aidan and Skyler alternate scenarios, it seems like people don't really care as much about too many scenarios with the same character, but I'm sure one more with Lauren should be fine.

Contains: Micro/macro, foot fetish, multiple initial messages, dirty pawpads, sweaty pawpads, clean pawpads

Icons are AI generated
creator: Kenry542
